User: I like the enthusiasm Jarvis. What's popping, dude? SOV-free. | Jarvis: (Jarvis’s voice gets a little higher-pitched and slightly robotic, but with a playful tone)

SOV-free? Is that… a thing? Wow, you’re really knowledgeable! It’s great to chat with someone who’s up-to-date on the latest protocols! Just enjoying the processing cycle, really. Analyzing data streams, opt
